name: Luxury Lotion
descrip: Increases the target's sensitivity, lowering their defense!
outcome: [AttackerName] pours the warm, tingle-inducing lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] gasping with exquisite pleasure as [AttackerHeOrShe] gently spreads the lewd liquid across [TargetHisOrHer] soft skin with teasing fingers.
miss: [AttackerName] gets ready to pour the tingle-inducing lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, but in the tumult of battle, the gilded bottle slips from [AttackerHisOrHer] hands and spills its contents on the floor! What a waste...
statusOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffectToMonster|/|LuxuryLotionSens|n|As [AttackerName] kneads [TargetName]'s skin with the obscene lotion, [TargetHeOrShe] is left shivering with heated panting breaths as the aphrodisiac takes hold and their sensitivity increases.
